metadata.description: Integration Service API Workflow for source_system 'vendor-nimbus'. Emits a 'vendor-attribution' event payload (schema: specs/003-uipath-native/event-contracts/vendor-attribution.json-schema.json) consumed by the Maestro Trigger on transition edge_ALryM7 (Multi-Customer Investigation -> Vector Isolation) and drives Reversal 2. DEPLOY-TIME NOTE: the live Data Fabric read (Vendor.connected_providers entity) and the Maestro Trigger emission are wired at deploy via 'uip api-workflow registry stub' against a live tenant. Here the payload is shaped from workflow inputs (Data Fabric defaults) by a JavaScript/Assign activity; the connector read is NOT hand-authored.

script.code: return { event_type: 'vendor-attribution', source_system: 'vendor-nimbus', simulated_day: $workflow.input.simulated_day, vendor_id: 'nimbus', evidence_signal_strength: $workflow.input.evidence_signal_strength, connected_provider_ids: $workflow.input.connected_provider_ids, clearflow_cleared: $workflow.input.clearflow_cleared, vector_hypothesis_confidence: $workflow.input.vector_hypothesis_confidence };

Response_1.response: ${{ event_type: $context.outputs.Javascript_BuildPayload.event_type, source_system: $context.outputs.Javascript_BuildPayload.source_system, simulated_day: $context.outputs.Javascript_BuildPayload.simulated_day, vendor_id: $context.outputs.Javascript_BuildPayload.vendor_id, evidence_signal_strength: $context.outputs.Javascript_BuildPayload.evidence_signal_strength, connected_provider_ids: $context.outputs.Javascript_BuildPayload.connected_provider_ids, clearflow_cleared: $context.outputs.Javascript_BuildPayload.clearflow_cleared, vector_hypothesis_confidence: $context.outputs.Javascript_BuildPayload.vector_hypothesis_confidence }}
